title: SaaS Shelfware Cost Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to quantify the financial impact of unused or underutilized SaaS licenses, based on Lean and Six Sigma waste reduction principles.

inputs.label: Total Licenses Purchased
inputs.businessContext: Total number of SaaS licenses paid for in the current period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of SaaS licenses paid for in the current period.

inputs.label: Active Users (Monthly)
inputs.businessContext: Number of distinct users who logged in at least once in the last 30 days.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of distinct users who logged in at least once in the last 30 days.

inputs.label: License Cost per Month
inputs.businessContext: Monthly recurring cost per license, including any fixed fees divided by license count.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly recurring cost per license, including any fixed fees divided by license count.

inputs.label: One-Time Implementation Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of onboarding, training, and integration for the SaaS tool.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of onboarding, training, and integration for the SaaS tool.

inputs.label: Monthly Support & Admin Cost
inputs.businessContext: Recurring internal labor and third-party support costs to maintain the tool.

businessContext_i18n.en: Recurring internal labor and third-party support costs to maintain the tool.

inputs.label: Contract Months Remaining
inputs.businessContext: Number of months left in the current contract or commitment period.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of months left in the current contract or commitment period.

inputs.label: Utilization Threshold for Waste
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of active users vs total licenses below which licenses are considered shelfware (Lean waste).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of active users vs total licenses below which licenses are considered shelfware (Lean waste).

rules.message: Active users cannot exceed total licenses purchased.
Utilization threshold must be between 0 and 100.
Contract months remaining must be at least 1.

thresholds.message: Shelfware ratio exceeds 30% — immediate audit recommended.
Total waste cost exceeds $50,000 — escalate to procurement.

formulas.description: Percentage of licenses actively used (Six Sigma metric for process efficiency).
Number of licenses considered waste (shelfware) based on utilization threshold.
Recurring monthly cost of unused licenses (Lean waste cost).
Total waste cost over remaining contract period including implementation amortization.
Percentage of total SaaS spend that is waste (WERC benchmark metric).
Ratio of shelfware licenses to total licenses (ISO 22400 waste indicator).
Waste cost adjusted for data confidence (Monte Carlo simulation proxy using 90% confidence factor).

primary.label: Total Shelfware Waste Cost
primary.description: Primary result: total financial waste from unused SaaS licenses over the contract period.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Underutilized Enterprise Plans
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Enterprise-tier licenses with low usage often have higher per-seat cost, amplifying waste.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Auto-Renewal Inertia
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Contracts set to auto-renew without usage review lead to prolonged waste.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Shadow IT Duplication
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Multiple similar tools purchased by different departments without consolidation.

suggestedActions.label: Renegotiate Contract
suggestedActions.description: Use waste data to negotiate a reduction in license count or switch to usage-based pricing.

suggestedActions.label: Implement Usage Monitoring
suggestedActions.description: Deploy automated tracking (e.g., SAM tools) to identify inactive users monthly.

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate Redundant Tools
suggestedActions.description: Eliminate overlapping SaaS products to reduce total license count.

suggestedActions.label: Increase User Adoption
suggestedActions.description: Provide targeted training to underutilized departments to improve active usage.

dataConfidenceAdjusted.label: Data Confidence Adjusted Waste
dataConfidenceAdjusted.description: Waste cost adjusted by 90% confidence factor to account for data uncertainty.
